benefits.description: Significant weight loss on Retatrutide after 3 months, shredding weight at higher level
Tons of energy on Retatrutide due to 3rd GCG receptor targeting, fat oxidation and increased energy expenditure
Both Tirzepatide and Retatrutide cut desire for alcohol and fatty/sugary foods, enjoy healthier food

side_effects.description: Tirzepatide made presence felt strongly, overwhelming appetite suppression unnaturally strong

protocol_notes: User has been on Retatrutide for 3+ months. Recommends Retatrutide over Tirzepatide as more powerful with less side effects. Notes that Retatrutide doesn't feel like being on medication. Mentions using lower dose Retatrutide dosing (2x/week) to minimize side effects. Tesamorelin noted as causing only water retention for first few days, used to cut visceral fat.
